test_cases.description: Verifies the skill produces a complete ASCII hierarchy tree with URLs for a SaaS site
test_cases.input: I'm building a SaaS marketing site for a project management tool. Create the page hierarchy with URLs.

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill applies correct URL design principles (hyphens, readable, no dates)
test_cases.input: Should my blog URLs use dates like /blog/2024/01/15/my-post or just /blog/my-post?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill provides hub-and-spoke internal linking strategy for content sites
test_cases.input: How should I implement internal linking for my SEO content blog with pillar pages?
